# Pattern Results With Inline Schema And Auto-Generated Destination Schemas

This matrix shows the customer query, generated SQL or validation result, and a simple before/after sample transformation for every supported pattern.

| Description of test case | User query | Generated SQL statements | Example sample before and after transfer |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| JSON to JSON simple filter without schema | Create a JSON Flink job from orders.raw to orders.cleaned, keep order_id and status, and filter where status is ACTIVE. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>status STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned',<br>  'value.format' = 'JSON'<br>) ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned`<br>SELECT<br>order_id AS order_id,<br>status AS status<br>FROM `orders.raw`<br>WHERE status == 'ACTIVE';<br> | Before: [{"order_id":"A1","status":"ACTIVE"},{"order_id":"A2","status":"INACTIVE"}]<br><br>After: [["A1","ACTIVE"]] |
| JSON to JSON nested filter without schema | Create a nested JSON Flink job from orders.raw.nested to orders.cleaned.nested, keep order.id and customer.name, and filter for order.id equal to A1. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.nested` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>customer_name STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.nested',<br>  'value.format' = 'JSON'<br>) ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.nested`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>customer.name AS customer_name<br>FROM `orders.raw.nested`<br>WHERE order.id == 'A1';<br><br>-- Generated JSON Schema<br>{"$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema", "title": "orders_cleaned_nested", "type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "customer_name": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id", "customer_name"], "additionalProperties": false} | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"customer":{"name":"Junaid"}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"customer":{"name":"Sara"}}]<br><br>After: [["A1","Junaid"]] |
| Nested JSON to flat JSON without schema | Create a Flink job from orders.raw.deep to orders.cleaned.flat, flatten order.id and amount.total with underscores, and filter where amount.total is greater than 0. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.flat` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>amount_total DOUBLE<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.flat',<br>  'value.format' = 'JSON'<br>) ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.flat`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>amount.total AS amount_total<br>FROM `orders.raw.deep`<br>WHERE amount.total > 0;<br><br>-- Generated JSON Schema<br>{"$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema", "title": "orders_cleaned_flat", "type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "amount_total": {"type": "number"}}, "required": ["order_id", "amount_total"], "additionalProperties": false} | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"amount":{"total":99.5}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"amount":{"total":0}}]<br><br>After: [["A1",99.5]] |
| Avro to Avro simple filter with inline schema | Create an Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro to orders.cleaned.avro, keep order_id and status, filter for ACTIVE, and use this inline Avro schema for the target. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>status STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrderRecord", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": "string"}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order_id AS order_id,<br>status AS status<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro`<br>WHERE status == 'ACTIVE';<br> | Before: [{"order_id":"A1","status":"ACTIVE"},{"order_id":"A2","status":"INACTIVE"}]<br><br>After: [["A1","ACTIVE"]] |
| Avro to Avro simple filter with auto-generated schema | Create an Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro to orders.cleaned.avro, keep order_id and status, and filter for ACTIVE without giving a schema. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>status STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order_id AS order_id,<br>status AS status<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro`<br>WHERE status == 'ACTIVE';<br><br>-- Auto-generated Avro Schema<br>{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]} | Before: [{"order_id":"A1","status":"ACTIVE"},{"order_id":"A2","status":"INACTIVE"}]<br><br>After: [["A1","ACTIVE"]] |
| Nested Avro to nested Avro with inline schema | Create a nested Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro.nested to orders.cleaned.avro.nested, keep order.id and customer.name, filter for order.id equal to A1, and use this inline Avro schema for the target. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro.nested` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>customer_name STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro.nested',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrderRecord", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": "string"}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro.nested`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>customer.name AS customer_name<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro.nested`<br>WHERE order.id == 'A1';<br> | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"customer":{"name":"Junaid"}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"customer":{"name":"Sara"}}]<br><br>After: [["A1","Junaid"]] |
| Nested Avro to nested Avro with auto-generated schema | Create a nested Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro.nested to orders.cleaned.avro.nested, keep order.id and customer.name, and filter for order.id equal to A1 without giving a schema. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro.nested` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>customer_name STRING<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro.nested',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvroNested", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro.nested`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>customer.name AS customer_name<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro.nested`<br>WHERE order.id == 'A1';<br><br>-- Auto-generated Avro Schema<br>{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvroNested", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]} | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"customer":{"name":"Junaid"}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"customer":{"name":"Sara"}}]<br><br>After: [["A1","Junaid"]] |
| Nested Avro to flat Avro with inline schema | Create a flattened Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro.deep to orders.cleaned.avro.flat, flatten order.id and amount.total with underscores, filter where amount.total is greater than 0, and use this inline Avro schema for the target. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro.flat` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>amount_total BIGINT<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro.flat',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrderRecord", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": "string"}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro.flat`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>amount.total AS amount_total<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro.deep`<br>WHERE amount.total > 0;<br> | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"amount":{"total":50}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"amount":{"total":-1}}]<br><br>After: [["A1",50]] |
| Nested Avro to flat Avro with auto-generated schema | Create a flattened Avro Flink job from orders.raw.avro.deep to orders.cleaned.avro.flat, flatten order.id and amount.total with underscores, and filter where amount.total is greater than 0 without giving a schema. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.avro.flat` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>amount_total BIGINT<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.avro.flat',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvroFlat", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "long"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.avro.flat`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>amount.total AS amount_total<br>FROM `orders.raw.avro.deep`<br>WHERE amount.total > 0;<br><br>-- Auto-generated Avro Schema<br>{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedAvroFlat", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "long"], "default": null}]} | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"amount":{"total":50}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"amount":{"total":-1}}]<br><br>After: [["A1",50]] |
| Nested JSON to Avro with inline schema | Create a Flink job from JSON topic orders.raw.cross to Avro topic orders.cleaned.cross.avro, map order.id to order_id and amount.total to total_amount, filter where amount.total is greater than 0, and use this inline Avro schema for the target. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.cross.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>total_amount DOUBLE<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.cross.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrderRecord", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": "string"}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.cross.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>amount.total AS total_amount<br>FROM `orders.raw.cross`<br>WHERE amount.total > 0;<br> | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"amount":{"total":120.5}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"amount":{"total":0}}]<br><br>After: [["A1",120.5]] |
| Nested JSON to Avro with auto-generated schema | Create a Flink job from JSON topic orders.raw.cross to Avro topic orders.cleaned.cross.avro, map order.id to order_id and amount.total to total_amount, and filter where amount.total is greater than 0 without giving a schema. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.cross.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>total_amount DOUBLE<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.cross.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedCrossAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.cross.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order.id AS order_id,<br>amount.total AS total_amount<br>FROM `orders.raw.cross`<br>WHERE amount.total > 0;<br><br>-- Auto-generated Avro Schema<br>{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedCrossAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}]} | Before: [{"order":{"id":"A1"},"amount":{"total":120.5}},{"order":{"id":"A2"},"amount":{"total":0}}]<br><br>After: [["A1",120.5]] |
| JSON to Avro with inline schema | Create a Flink job from JSON topic orders.raw.cross.simple to Avro topic orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro, keep order_id and amount, filter where amount is greater than 0, and use this inline Avro schema for the target. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>amount DOUBLE<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrderRecord", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": "string"}, {"name": "customer_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount_total", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "total_amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}, {"name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order_id AS order_id,<br>amount AS amount<br>FROM `orders.raw.cross.simple`<br>WHERE amount > 0;<br> | Before: [{"order_id":"A1","amount":12.0},{"order_id":"A2","amount":0}]<br><br>After: [["A1",12.0]] |
| JSON to Avro with auto-generated schema | Create a Flink job from JSON topic orders.raw.cross.simple to Avro topic orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro, keep order_id and amount, and filter where amount is greater than 0 without giving a schema. | CREATE TABLE `orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro` (<br>order_id STRING,<br>amount DOUBLE<br>) WITH (<br>  'connector' = 'confluent',<br>  'topic' = 'orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro',<br>  'value.format' = 'AVRO',<br>  'value.avro-schema' = '{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedCrossSimpleAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}]}') ;<br><br>INSERT INTO `orders.cleaned.cross.simple.avro`<br>SELECT<br>order_id AS order_id,<br>amount AS amount<br>FROM `orders.raw.cross.simple`<br>WHERE amount > 0;<br><br>-- Auto-generated Avro Schema<br>{"type": "record", "name": "OrdersCleanedCrossSimpleAvro", "fields": [{"name": "order_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}, {"name": "amount", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null}]} | Before: [{"order_id":"A1","amount":12.0},{"order_id":"A2","amount":0}]<br><br>After: [["A1",12.0]] |
